CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD THE BASIS OF EACH CLAIM WITH MORE CLARITY AND COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.112. CROSS-COMPLAINT MUST SET FORTH THE PARTY AGAINST WHOM A CAUSE OF ACTION IS ALLEGED AND DESCRIBE THE DAMAGES BEING REQUESTED WITH RESPECT TO EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT SHOULD CONTAIN A PRAYER AT THE END. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
CROSS-DEFENDANTS FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, INC., KAREN ALARCON, RUBY URIBE AND JOY FIELDS'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Cross-complainant to plead the basis of each claim with more clarity and comply with California Rule of Court 2.112. Cross-complainant must set forth the party against whom a cause of action is alleged and describe the damages being requested with respect to each cause of action. The cross-complaint should contain a prayer at the end. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Continued To Oct-22-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
